creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153715
svn diff for sysutils/aimage

I discovered the web site listed as WWW is a
pay-per-click site, and has been for over a year.
So I thought I'd maintain this port.

Changes:
take MAINTAINER
add LICENSE
fix (change) WWW
reflow pkg-descr

That's it!

Please also find the QA session LOG, along with this svn diff, attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
